things.name: Nur-Alem Pavilion (Expo 2017)
things.description: World's largest spherical building - a glass globe housing a museum of future energy

things.name: Baiterek Tower
things.description: 105m landmark tower representing the Tree of Life with a golden orb and city views

things.name: Khan Shatyr Entertainment Centre
things.description: Norman Foster's transparent tent-shaped mall with an indoor beach resort

things.name: Palace of Peace and Reconciliation
things.description: Norman Foster's glass pyramid hosting interfaith dialogues with a 1,500-seat opera house

things.name: National Museum of Kazakhstan
things.description: Kazakhstan's largest museum telling the story of the Kazakh steppe and Golden Horde

things.name: Nur-Sultan Grand Mosque
things.description: Gleaming new mosque - one of Central Asia's largest with 30,000 capacity

things.name: Nurzhol Boulevard
things.description: Grand central boulevard lined with Akorda Presidential Palace and government buildings

things.name: Hazrat Sultan Mosque
things.description: Kazakhstan's largest mosque with four minarets and gold domes

things.name: Singing Fountain (Tsentralny Park)
things.description: Central park with a famous musical fountain show and cable car

things.name: MEGA Shopping Mall Ice Rink
things.description: Year-round outdoor ice rink and entertainment complex
